title: Ballard Announces Multiple Orders for European Bus Market
text: Ballard Power Systems announced multiple orders from two bus manufacturers totaling over 90 fuel cell engines, representing approximately 6.4 megawatts (MW) of power capacity for the European and UK city bus market. The 90+ fuel cell engines with 6.4 MW rated capacity are destined for zero-emission alternatives to diesel engines in city buses. Chief Commercial Officer David Mucciacciaro stated: These orders further validate the benefits of fuel cells as a zero-emission alternative to diesel engines and the ability of Ballard engines to deliver the demanding performance requirements of city buses. The announcement highlights Ballard's progress in securing platform wins and repeat business from bus OEMs, demonstrating continued market traction despite broader industry challenges. These orders are part of Ballard's strategic focus on the bus segment, which has emerged as the most mature application for fuel cell technology in heavy-duty vehicles.
